description: Assisted in drafting optimization frameworks for multi-billion parameter model pre-training steps, leading to a 12% reduced memory footprint.
Conducted detailed empirical research in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) context compression and state-preservation techniques.
Co-authored research blueprints analyzing attention convergence patterns in high-contrast visual models (ViT).
Engineered automated semantic parsing pipelines for 10+ multinational e-commerce portfolios, enabling instant client search suggestions with extreme accuracy.
Configured lightweight, edge-runnable Object Detection APIs using YOLOv8, deployed via Docker containers onto remote industrial camera sensors.
Maintained 100% Client Satisfaction Score by delivering on-time, fully documented statistical modeling systems.
Completed rigorous immersive training focused on hyperparameter tuning, neural backpropagation, learning rate schedulers, and structural model compression.
Engineered peer-reviewed capstone project modeling complex credit default probabilities over 10 million simulated customer nodes.
Achieved Top-1% ranking in final technical examination spanning advanced multi-variable calculus, linear algebra, and data engineering.
Designed and presented a 4-hour hands-on instruction session detailing prompt injection vectors and stateful Multi-Agent conversation tracking via LangGraph.
Curated modular companion repository showing clear setups for 400+ attendees to configure local Llama3 instances with zero API friction.
